result:
Report written to `/home/nate/charos/haros-events/jarvis-audit/windows-host-report.md`.

**Headline finding:** Comet (Perplexity browser) is using **10.1 GB across 56 processes** — single-handedly responsible for ~40% of currently-used RAM. Restarting Comet alone takes Dad from 80% → ~50%.

**WSL2 is not the culprit.** No `.wslconfig` exists, so WSL2 is running on its 16 GB default cap (50% of host), but it's only consuming 1.6 GB on the Windows side (`vmmemWSL`) and 2.5 GB of 16 GB inside the VM. A defensive `memory=12GB` cap is recommended but not urgent.

**Other reclaim:** Chrome 840 MB, Discord 701 MB, Steam 578 MB, VS Code 550 MB, Docker Desktop 415 MB. Closing any unused ones gets another ~2 GB. Total effort < 5 min for Dad.

Read-only — no config touched.
